name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Off Days upgraded: the calendar shows each person's name on their day off (with bigger numbers), and there's a new Shifts panel beside it to set the month's morning/night roster.
The days-off log now shows one month at a time with search and sort, and groups a run of consecutive days into a single entry.
Pick a month from the dropdown (or the arrows) to view that month's calendar, shifts and log together.
